summary: Staggered text lines from custom directions animation component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-stagger-lines/src/TitleStaggerLines.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleStaggerLines` and `titleStaggerLinesDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleStaggerLines` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Stagger Lines Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-stagger-lines to my project. Preserve the exported TitleStaggerLinesProps API and register the TitleStaggerLines composition with the default props.
